# Copilot Workspace Instructions

## Quick Start
- Build: dotnet build SocOps/SocOps.csproj
- Run: dotnet run --project SocOps (dev server at http://localhost:5166)

## What to Edit
- SocOps/Components/ – UI components (BingoBoard, GameScreen, modals)
- SocOps/Pages/ – routable pages (Home, Counter, Weather)
- SocOps/Services/ – game logic and state
- SocOps/Models/ – domain types
- SocOps/wwwroot/css/app.css – CSS utility classes

## Tips
- Keep C# idiomatic (PascalCase, no unused usings/vars)
- Keep UI changes small and consistent with existing style
- Use workshop/ for lab exercises and .github/instructions/ for styling guidance
